title: Use perform_job/3 with string-keyed args in an Oban test
prompt: Write a test at `test/my_app/mailer/digest_worker_test.exs` that imports `Oban.Testing` via `use Oban.Testing, repo: MyApp.Repo`, and invokes `perform_job(MyApp.Mailer.DigestWorker, %{"user_id" => 1})` with STRING-keyed args (not atom keys). Include `use MyApp.DataCase, async: true` and assert `perform_job/3` returns `:ok`.
tier_rationale: String-keyed args are the canonical Oban testing idiom but Claude frequently writes atom keys.
